subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-10-28
subcodes.first_line: The pilgrimage to the Holy Tomb must be done with spiritual concentration, attention and humility; it must not be like the automaton pilgrimage of Mohamedans or Christians
subcodes.first_line_orig: زیارت باید در نهایت تضرع و ابتهال باشد والا زیارت نیست تماشا است اینهمه نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
